message.content:
@startuml

class Project
class User
class Submission
class Admin
class Author
class Editor
class Revision
class Resource
class Comment
class Document
class AudioFile
class Video

' Project to User (association, 1 to *)
Project "1" -- "*" User

' Project to Submission (composition, 1 to *)
Project "1" *-- "*" Submission

' Project to Resource (association, 1 to 1)
Project "1" --> "1" Resource

' Admin extends User
Admin --|> User

' Author extends User
Author --|> User

' Editor extends User
Editor --|> User

' Submission to Author (aggregation, 1 to 1)
Submission "1" o-- "1" Author

' Submission to Editor (composition, 1 to 1)
Submission "1" *-- "1" Editor

' Submission to Revision (composition, 1 to *)
Submission "1" *-- "*" Revision

' Submission to Resource (composition, 1 to 1)
Submission "1" *--> "1" Resource

' Author to Editor (association, 1 to 1)
Author "1" --> "1" Editor

' Author to Comment (association, 1 to *)
Author "1" --> "*" Comment

' Revision to Comment (aggregation, 1 to 1)
Revision "1" o-- "1" Comment

' Revision to Resource (aggregation, 1 to 1)
Revision "1" o--> "1" Resource

' Editor to Comment (association, 1 to 1)
Editor "1" --> "1" Comment

' Resource to 1 (association)
Submission "1" --> "1" Resource

' Document extends Resource
Document --|> Resource

' AudioFile extends Resource
AudioFile --|> Resource

' Video extends Resource
Video --|> Resource

' Resource aggregation with Revision
Resource "1" --o "1*" Revision

@enduml
